title: Digital Clocks
description: This datapack adds a digital clock to Minecraft.
body:
This datapack adds a digital clock to Minecraft.  
  
<iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZD-HoukYB0o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

  There are several types of clocks:  

-   Clock of in-game time - displays the current time inside the game in a convenient 24-hour format
-   Timer - can be used for any competitive games to conveniently display the remaining time
-   Customizable manual clock - set the displayed time manually
  
Use this command to get the clock:  
```
/loot give @s loot clocks:clock
```
  
The clock is managed using a dynamically changing book that displays all the current settings of the selected clock. Each clock works independently of each other.  
  
  The datapack also supports translation into other languages. To do this, you just need to place one function with its translation in the `data\clocks\functions\translate` folder of the datapack, and after reloading the datapack, it is enough to update the list of translations inside the dynamic book.  
  
  Let me know if you see any inaccuracies in the translation.  
  
  This datapack is not intended for survival mode.
